summary: True Joy Birthing Doula Service Agreement Contract System - Backend API testing completed. All 22 tests pass (100%). Complete contract workflow verified: template retrieval, contract creation with payment details, sending with doula signature, client signing, and HTML view generation.
seed_data_creation: Created test Doula user with client for contract testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract system fully tested. All 8 sections verified (Introduction, Role & Boundaries, Services, Restrictions, Privacy, Payment Terms, Cancellations, Acknowledgements). Services section includes 6 subsections (Initial Consultation, Prenatal Visits, On-Call Period, Labor Attendance, After Birth, Postpartum Support).

features_tested.GET /api/doula/contract-template: PASS - Returns full True Joy Birthing template with all 8 sections
features_tested.POST /api/doula/contracts: PASS - Creates contract with client_names, due_date, payment amounts, all template sections
features_tested.GET /api/contracts/{id}: PASS - Returns contract with client and doula info
features_tested.POST /api/doula/contracts/{id}/send: PASS - Sends contract and creates doula_signature
features_tested.POST /api/contracts/{id}/sign: PASS - Allows client to sign with name, creates client_signature
features_tested.GET /api/contracts/{id}/html: PASS - Returns formatted HTML version with all sections
features_tested.additional_terms_storage: PASS - Additional terms field stored and displayed in HTML

signature_workflow_verified.doula_signature: Created when contract is sent (status changes to 'Sent')
signature_workflow_verified.client_signature: Created when client signs (status changes to 'Signed')
signature_workflow_verified.validation: Cannot sign draft contract, cannot double sign, signer name required
